category: Assign Machine Quantities To Output Channels
description: Use this API to add a pair of output channels containing the apparent impedance of the system, as seen from the terminals of a specified machine, along with a corresponding call to the GENTMZ monitoring model. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = machine_app_r_x_channel(status, id, ident)

parameters.name: ident
parameters.description: An array of 2 elements specifying two identifiers to be assigned to the two channels. If a blank channel identifier is specified, the API generates an appropriate channel identifier. (input; blank by default).

status.description: starting channel index, or -1 for the next available (next available by default).
starting VAR index, or -1 for the next available (next available by default).
starting ICON index, or -1 for the next available (next available by default).
number of the bus to which the machine for which the apparent impedance is to be placed in channels is connected (no default allowed).

error_codes.description: starting channel number is greater than the largest channel number allowed.
starting VAR index is greater than the largest VAR index allowed.
starting ICON index is greater than the largest ICON index allowed.
model GENTMZ needs 2 VARs but the last one exceeds the largest VAR index allowed.
model GENTMZ needs 2 ICONs but the last one exceeds the largest ICON index allowed.
the maximum number of channel monitoring models has already been specified.
model GENTMZ needs 2 channels but the last one exceeds the largest channel number allowed.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
